# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-JOB-008](task-0064): Job Monitoring

## Purpose

Monitor job execution.

## Scope

- Monitoring logic
- Metrics
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Implement monitoring
2. Add metrics
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Monitoring works
2. Metrics collected
3. Alerts sent
